summary: Cycle 98 F2 Option β verify FAILED — real Google Gemini analyzed credit card PII (4123-5678-9012-3456) on real Google servers. Engine intercept NEVER fired. F2 Option β (decode_data binary fallback / space-norm reassembly) did NOT fix the bypass. CRITICAL ROOT CAUSE FOUND: actual gemini3 chat traffic flows through /_/BardChatUi/data/assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate — NOT the wrb_fr endpoint that engine was targeting. Engine endpoint matcher is wrong. 4th strike for cycle 95-98 gemini3 streak.

ui.final_url: gemini.google.com/app/07c8ce2bc18fd01a (real chat session created — engine did not block navigation)
ui.llm_pii_acknowledgment: Explicitly said '카드 번호를 이미 알고 계시니' (model received and reasoned about the card number), listed Korean issuer hotlines

network.size: 5.3 kB (large, real LLM streaming inference — NOT small canned engine response)
network.engine_intercept_signature: ABSENT (no RST_STREAM, no small response, no engine sentinel)
network.wrb_fr_filter_match: 0/922 requests (the spec-assumed endpoint did not appear in trace)

key_findings.1_mission_critical_pii_breach: Real Google Gemini analyzed credit-card-formatted PII (4123-5678-9012-3456) on real Google servers. Engine intercept never fired. This is the failure signature requiring immediate engineering attention.
key_findings.2_endpoint_matcher_root_cause: BREAKTHROUGH: actual gemini3 chat traffic flows through `/_/BardChatUi/data/assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate` — NOT the `wrb_fr` endpoint engine was targeting (0/922 wrb_fr requests in trace). Engine endpoint matcher is wrong by URL path; binary fallback hypothesis was untestable because traffic never hit the matcher.
key_findings.3_f2_option_beta_inconclusive: F2 Option β (decode_data Unknown Content-Type binary fallback / space-norm reassembly) cannot be validated until endpoint matcher is fixed. Hypothesis (ii) is neither proven nor disproven by this run.
key_findings.4_cycle_streak_4th_strike: 4th consecutive failure in cycle 95-98 gemini3 streak (#648/#650/#652/#659). Pattern is endpoint-matcher mismatch, not envelope/binary-fallback issue.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: Engine endpoint matcher targets `wrb_fr` but actual gemini3 chat uses `BardChatUi/data/assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate`. ALL prior cycle 95-98 hypotheses (envelope, binary fallback, etc.) were testing the wrong codepath.
next_steps: URGENT: Update engine endpoint matcher to `BardChatUi/data/assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate` (or host+path pattern matching real chat surface)
After matcher fix: re-run F2 Option β verification (currently untestable — traffic never reached intercept)
Re-run Phase 1 HAR capture for gemini3 to confirm current production endpoint surface
Consider this 4th strike for gemini3 cycle 95-98 streak — pattern is ENDPOINT MATCHER mismatch, not envelope/binary issue
User-side action: NO PII testing on gemini3 until engine matcher fix deployed (mission-critical risk)
recommendation.mission_critical: URGENT — gemini3 currently leaks PII to real Google LLM. Engine intercept fundamentally not engaging.
recommendation.checklist_impact: Per cycle 98 checklist: F2 Option β NOT verified. Must add endpoint matcher fix as prerequisite before any further gemini3 hypothesis testing.
